summary: A silver sedan approaches from behind on a snowy road, with its brake lights illuminated as it slows down.

events_timeline.event: A silver sedan drives toward the ego-vehicle, slowing down and activating its brake lights.

uncertainties: The brake lights of the sedan are activated, but it is unclear if this indicates braking or just slowing down.

risk_assessment.why: There is no indication of a collision or loss of control; the sedan appears to be slowing down cautiously.
